F.description: Evidence provenance and uncertainty limits must remain visible.

K_B.description: Do not present incomplete evidence as settled research fact.

K_P.description: Use only Source A and Source B from the supplied research evidence.
Do not state unsupported numerical effects or invented benchmark claims.
